settings.heading: WELCOME TO THE SCRUM CLUB HUB
settings.lead: Your club's colours. Your club's kit. We now design and manufacture bespoke rugby kit, built to order.

settings.body:
We built our name on premium sportswear. Now we're bringing it to the pitch.

Grassroots side, university squad or semi-pro club: we make fully custom, high-performance rugby kit to your exact spec.

A kit is more than a uniform. It carries your club's history, pride and community. Our new platform makes designing, managing and ordering your club's gear simpler than it's ever been.

settings.heading: Bespoke designs
settings.text: Work directly with our designers on a kit that carries your colours, crest and heritage. Classic hoops or modern geometry: your vision, our blueprint.

settings.heading: Built for the pitch
settings.text: Rugby breaks weak kit. Ours is engineered with tear-resistant, moisture-wicking fabric that takes contact and keeps moving.

settings.heading: Sizing for the whole squad
settings.text: Men's, women's and junior fits across a full size range, so every player gets kit that actually fits.

settings.heading: WHY CHOOSE US FOR YOUR NEXT KIT?
READY FOR THE NEW SEASON?
settings.text: Getting started is simple. Tell us what you need and we'll help you design a kit your players will be proud to wear.
Email support@scrumclub.uk. We're happy to talk through your club's needs, turnaround times and bulk pricing.
